items.text:
Hey! Got a social media account? That's all you need!

I'm partnering with a snack brand and they're looking for creators to make fun content 🎥

Here's what you get:
🍜 FREE snack box to try
💰 $5 cash for every video that hits 1K views
🎁 Bonus prizes when your content pops off

No follower minimum — anyone can join!
Interested? Full details in the picture below!

items.text:
Casting Call: Athletic Female Model/Actress (18–30)
Location: Ontario, CA (or relatively close)

Shoot Date: June 18, 19 or 20th 

Compensation: $100 for 3-4 hours of work, plus any meals/snacks -- not negotiable

I am reshooting a project and I have an immediate need to cast a physically fit or athletic female model/actress (18–30) for an educational video project that will be shown to junior/community college students at a school in Southern California. This short-form documentary aims to explore the real-life accessibility and lifestyle challenges faced during a temporary injury requiring the use of crutches and a fiberglass splint and/or cast on the leg.

About the Role:

You’ll portray an individual recovering from a temporary lower-limb injury, navigating public spaces and day-to-day activities. Scenes may include attempting to use stairs, accessing public buildings, malls, shopping, navigating campus hallways, and more—while using crutches and a medical-grade cast/splint (provided). The shoot will be filmed in one day in 3-4 hours, but crafted to look like multiple days.

Ideal Candidate:

• Female, 18–30 years old

• Athletic, active, or fitness-oriented (to contrast with sudden mobility loss)

• Based in the greater Los Angeles area 

• Comfortable with physical activity on crutches

• Natural presence on camera; able to convey authentic emotion

• Will be required to bring different outfits shoes, and a few different items (backpack, etc), but the cast/splint and crutches are provided.

• Prior modeling or acting experience is a plus, but not required

• Prior injury experience, experience with crutches and/or a cast is also a plus, but not required

Project Highlights:

• Educational, socially conscious content

• Documentary-style, mostly improvised lines, with some lines and general content provided

• Produced for classroom use to foster empathy and accessibility awareness

• Safe, supportive environment with clear direction and assistance

• Ability to get creative and add to this project based on your past experience and experience during the shoot

To Apply:

Please send me a direct message, respond in the comments or  email Brettsmithh316@gmail.com the following information:

• Full name and age

• Headshot and full-body photo

• Short intro (ideally a video) about yourself and why you’re interested, including previous acting/modeling experience, athletic experience, and cast/crutches experience (if any!)

• Relevant experience (performance, sports, with injury or cast/crutches etc.)

• General availability this this Thursday, Friday or Saturday 

Note: All equipment (crutches, splint/cast) will be provided. The cast is non-permanent and purely for demonstration and will be applied/removed safely.

items.text:
FEATURE FILM – ASHES

Atlanta, GA | Non-Union | Paid
Rate: Starting at $300/day (negotiable for the right fit)
Shoot Window: Fall 2026

Casting Update:
Most principal and supporting roles have been cast. We are reopening submissions for the LEAD role of CAMILLE REYES.

LOGLINE

When a sharp Atlanta attorney is assigned to represent the estranged husband of her closest friend, buried history, desire, and betrayal force three people to choose what they’re willing to lose when loyalty turns to ash.

CAMILLE REYES (LEAD)

Woman, 30s
All ethnicities encouraged to submit.

A highly controlled Atlanta attorney whose carefully ordered life begins to unravel when unresolved feelings resurface during her best friend’s divorce case.

Camille carries the majority of the film and requires an actor capable of emotional restraint, intelligence, vulnerability, and strong screen presence. We’re looking for someone who can communicate internal conflict through behavior, silence, and subtle shifts rather than speeches.

Please submit:
• Headshot
• Resume (if available)
• Demo reel or self-tape
• Contact information

Subject Line:
ASHES – CAMILLE SUBMISSION

Send to:
S.johnsonstudiosatl@gmail.com

NOW SEEKING: SEEKING CAMILLE REYES LEAD WOMAN, 30s ALL ETHNICITIES TO SUBMIT ENCOURAGED CARRIES 90+ PAGES OF THE FILM. ATLANTA, ATLANTA,G GA NON-UNION PAID ($300+/DAY) ($300+ SUBMIT: S.JOHNSONSTUDIOSATLOGMAIL.COM'

items.text:
PAID CASTING – 1 MALE & 1 FEMALE – LONDON – TOMORROW
We’re looking for two confident on-camera performers for a UGC-style social media shoot tomorrow in London.

Looking for:

– 1 male performer, playing age 20–35

– 1 female performer, playing age 20–35

– Caucasion, British accent preferred

– Must be comfortable with quick dialogue, reactions and natural TikTok-style delivery

The project is short-form content for an AI study / everyday help app. We’ll be shooting multiple short clips across the day. Scripts will be provided, but you do not need to fully memorise everything — we can prompt lines on the day.

Shoot date: Tomorrow 13 Jun 2026

Location: London

Small crew, fast-paced UGC shoot

Potential for regular ongoing collaboration

Please DM me!

items.text:
Am I the A**hole or...?”  

 

🥴 Have you ever done something that you felt was TOTALLY justified but on telling others, are met with cries of: “you did WHAT?!”  

 

😯 Maybe you have a dating story which, on paper, doesn’t sound so great but when you explain the context you were definitely in the RIGHT?!  

 

😏 Perhaps you and your partner have an ongoing debate about something that shouldn’t be a big deal but really, really is? Do you want it settled once and for all and to know who is actually right? (you, obvs).  

 

Well, who better to cast judgement than Jimmy Carr! This is the show that will finally give you the validation you crave... (or not).  

 

Produced by Tuesday’s Child for Comedy Central, Am I The A**Hole is a studio-based comedy entertainment show, inspired by one of Reddit’s most successful subreddits, bringing its distinctive brand of humour and judgement to TV.  

 

📺 Casting is underway and we are looking for a broad range of people to apply, either as an individual or as a duo – couples, family, housemates etc; as long as you’re over 18 and living in the UK. We would love to hear from anyone interested, filling out the application won’t mean an obligation to take part but does mean our team will be able to reach out to you for a chat.  

 

Filming will be taking place in July, 2026 and successful cast will be paid. Casting is already underway, so get your application in ASAP.  

 

🔗https://shortaudition.com/AITAS2

items.text:
🎭𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌𝐄𝐑𝐒 𝐖𝐀𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐃🎭

𝐖𝐞 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐝, 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐣𝐨𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐚𝐥 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐚𝐬 𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬/𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐫 ✨

Do you love to sing and dance? Do you love a bit of fairytale and Disney-style magic? Do you love working with children? Then we want to hear from you! 🩵

Our books are open for our princess and character roles - come and join the fun! ✨

What we offer: 

⭐️Excellent rates of pay
⭐️Premium costumes and wigs for all events 
⭐️A like minded team of performers 
⭐️Liability insurance 
⭐️Flexible work on a bookings basis 

Requirements: 

⭐️Age 18+ 
⭐️Performing Arts/Musical Theatre/singing experience 
⭐️Full UK drivers license and own transport  
⭐️Based in Manchester/Greater Manchester 
⭐️Good weekend and seasonal availability  

💌 - To be considered for an audition, email your CV/Spotlight link with an up to date headshot to enola.enchantedevents@gmail.com 

𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐛𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟 𝐭𝐚𝐩𝐞 𝐢𝐟 𝐬𝐮𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐟𝐮𝐥 🎥

We can’t wait to hear from you! 🤍

𝐖𝐞 𝐚𝐫𝐞 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐥𝐨𝐨𝐤𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐭𝐚𝐥𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐝, 𝐫𝐞𝐥𝐢𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐩𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐭𝐞 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐣𝐨𝐢𝐧 𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐚𝐥 𝐭𝐞𝐚𝐦 𝐚𝐬 𝐚 𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬/𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐦𝐞𝐫 ✨

Do you love to sing and dance? Do you love a bit of fairytale and Disney-style magic? Do you love working with children? Then we want to hear from you! 🩵

Our books are open for our princess and character roles - come and join the fun! ✨

What we offer: 

⭐️Excellent rates of pay
⭐️Premium costumes and wigs for all events 
⭐️A like minded team of performers 
⭐️Liability insurance 
⭐️Flexible work on a bookings basis 

Requirements: 

⭐️Age 18+ 
⭐️Performing Arts/Musical Theatre/singing experience 
⭐️Full UK drivers license and own transport  
⭐️Based in Manchester/Greater Manchester 
⭐️Good weekend and seasonal availability  

💌 - To be considered for an audition, email your CV/Spotlight link with an up to date headshot to enola.enchantedevents@gmail.com 

𝐌𝐮𝐬𝐭 𝐛𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨 𝐬𝐞𝐥𝐟 𝐭𝐚𝐩𝐞 𝐢𝐟 𝐬𝐮𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐬𝐬𝐟𝐮𝐥 🎥

We can’t wait to hear from you! 🤍

Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

items.text:
Hello everyone — my name is Zacharia Botha and I am the founder of Vlyt Art Acting, an acting laboratory studio based in South Africa.

In 2023, I travelled to Yekaterinburg and had the opportunity to document rehearsals, performances, and interview artists working in contemporary Russian theatre — including Nikolay Kolyada.

I later created a video lecture introducing Коляда-Театр to Western audiences and sharing parts of my conversation with Nikolay Kolyada about theatre, acting, and how Kolyada Theatre works.

This March, I learned of Nikolay Kolyada’s passing.

Since then, I have been following the updates shared by the theatre community and wanted to share this message as a small gesture of solidarity from South Africa.

From what has been shared publicly, Kolyada Theatre is currently going through a legal transition period.

At the moment there is a process underway to formally recognise leadership so that the theatre can continue operating as an independent theatre organisation.

Why does this matter?

Because without formal recognition, practical things become difficult:
accessing accounts, paying salaries, processing administration, signing documents, submitting reports, managing ticket income, and keeping the theatre running.

The concern is not that the theatre has no audience.

The concern is that legal uncertainty could make it difficult for the theatre to continue functioning in its current form.

If you are Russian or part of the Russian diaspora and would like to support:
please consider writing a respectful letter or participating in the collective appeal.

Information and instructions:
[https://vk.ru/wall272872795_826](https://vk.ru/wall272872795_826)

If you would like to learn more:

🇷🇺 Watch recorded Kolyada Theatre productions on Nikolay Kolyada’s YouTube archive:
[https://www.youtube.com/@NikolaiNikolaevskij/playlists](https://www.youtube.com/@NikolaiNikolaevskij/playlists)

You can also explore performances and updates directly through Kolyada Theatre and related pages on VKontakte.

If you are in Yekaterinburg — attend a performance and support the theatre directly.

🇿🇦 For those interested in learning more about Kolyada Theatre in English, I recorded a video lecture introducing Kolyada Theatre to Western audiences and sharing excerpts from my interview with Nikolay Kolyada.

[https://youtu.be/4XP9g-0gOSE?si=xPZTi8_Y8M6XdkR9](https://youtu.be/4XP9g-0gOSE?si=xPZTi8_Y8M6XdkR9)

Thank you for your attention and support.

— Zacharia Botha
Founder, Vlyt Art Acting
South Africa

sharedPost.text:
KOLYADA EXPLAINING HOW THE KOLYADA THEATRE WORKS 🎭

In 2023, during my visit to Yekaterinburg, I had the opportunity to speak with Nikolay Kolyada about his theatre.

In this short excerpt, Kolyada explains in his own words how Kolyada Theatre works — how an independent theatre survives, how the troupe works together, and how they built a theatre through constant performances, new productions, and audiences.

This conversation feels especially meaningful now.

After Nikolay Kolyada’s passing earlier this year, Kolyada Theatre entered a legal transition period.

From what has been shared publicly, there is currently no formally recognised theatre leadership in place, and there is an ongoing process to formally recognise Eka Vashakidze’s leadership role.

Why does this matter?

Because without formal recognition, practical things become difficult:
accessing theatre accounts, paying salaries, processing staff administration, signing documents, managing ticket income, filing reports, and continuing to operate as an independent theatre organisation.

The concern is not that the theatre has no audience.

The concern is that legal uncertainty could place the continued operation of the theatre at risk.

If you are Russian or part of the Russian diaspora and would like to support Kolyada Theatre, please see the links in the comments to write a respectful letter or participate in collective appeals.

If you are a Russian speaker and would like to experience Kolyada Theatre directly, please see the comments for Nikolay’s YouTube archive with recorded productions.

If you are an international viewer and would like to learn more about Kolyada Theatre, please see my English video lecture in the comments.

Thank you for your attention and support.

— Zacharia Botha
Founder, Vlyt Art Acting

Contact us for more information, payment plans and dates -

act@actingclass.co.uk

*Completing training with us qualifies you for Spotlight eligibility.

items.summary:
Interested in Acting?

Our next course, Building Blocks Summer Intensive will run throughout August at our studio in Manchester!

There are a few places remaining for anyone interested in acting and ready to take the first step.

Contact us for more information, payment plans and dates -

act@actingclass.co.uk

*Completing training with us qualifies you for Spotlight eligibility.

www.actingclass.co.uk
items.title: Interested in Acting?

sharedPost.text:
50% BOOKED UP ALREADY !!!

JUST 8 PLACES AVAILABLE 

NEW ADULT COURSE AGE 16+
Coronation Street & Emmerdale Course!

I know we had lots of people that didn't manage to get a place on our last Coronation st/ Emmerdale Course so we have organised another one !! 

Our next adult acting course is a 4-week course for actors age 16+. In the final week, the actors will perform in a mock casting in front of Coronation St and Emmerdale Casting Associate Joanne Moss. Joanne will give feedback, notes and direction on each individual performance.

Joanne casts for Coronation St and Emmerdale.

We have had a great success rate from each Coronation course, we always have at least one person being cast in a small speaking role and more than one being asked to audition.

The course will include looking at  Coronation st scripts/ Coronation st / Emmerdale sides and Coronation/ Emmerdale  call sheets and Coronation st/ Emmerdale Mock Casting. 

Dates:

SUNDAY AUGUST 23RD 2PM-4PM
SUNDAY AUGUST 30TH 2PM- 4PM 
SUNDAY SEPTEMBER 6TH 2PM-4PM
SUNDAY SEPTEMBER 13TH  MOCK CASTING - ALLOCATED TIME SLOT CORONATION ST AND EMMERDALE 
 

CLICK HERE TO BOOK : https://screenplayacting.com/product-category/adults/#course

New Address – FREE PARKING!

Studio 96, Unit 1A and 1B, Sundance Court, Kansas Avenue, Salford, Media City, M50 2GZ

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"
Wanted !!!!!
I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet. But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men 25 to 36 years old, good looking who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

sharedPost.text:
Wanted!!
I'm having another creative burst.
Project called Just Go - The Day I left Kevin Costner 
I thought I'd do a casting call the other way around 
I want to make a short film between 10 and 30 minutes long—depending on how many actors want to participate. No pay.
You let me know if you want to participate as an actor and then I'll write a totally crazy script.
Just write "I want to" in the coments, and things can get crazy. or write a mail to Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
Every actor is shooting on his own a scene with his smart shone about 3 sentences and I will cut of those scenes the movie.The movie will be shown on International Film festivals. 
I'm excited to hear from you. 
Thats me ;
https://m.imdb.com/name/nm1591928/?ref_=tt_ov_1_1
The project :
https://m.imdb.com/title/tt40706407/?ref_=nv_sr_srsg_1_tt_8_nm_0_in_0_q_just%20go%20the%20day

🌟 REGALLY ROYAL PARTIES 🌟

CASTING CALL – 
CHILDREN’S ENTERTAINERS Southport , Liverpool , Preston!! 

Do you love performing, bringing characters to life, and creating magical memories for children? We are looking for enthusiastic performers to join our growing team!

We’re looking for people who are:

✨ Confident and outgoing
✨ Reliable and professional
✨ Great with children and families
✨ Energetic and enthusiastic
✨ Strong performers (acting, singing, dancing, or character work is a bonus)
✨ Able to work weekends and school holidays
✨ Team players with a positive attitude
✨ Passionate about making children’s dreams come true

📅 AUDITION DATES
25th June
26th June

What we offer:

👑 Competitive pay
👑 Exciting performance opportunities
👑 Flexible work! You set your schedule
👑 Ongoing training and support
👑 A fun and rewarding working environment

Join the magic and become part of the Regally Royal Parties family!

📲 To apply, send us a message on WhatsApp: 07889 288335

📧 Or email us: regallyroyalparties@yahoo.com

Regally Royal Parties

Creating magical memories, one celebration at a time. ✨👑

sharedPost.text:
📢 POSZUKUJEMY BRACI BIOLOGICZNYCH DO PŁATNEGO BADANIA TECHNOLOGICZNEGO 📢

Poszukujemy biologicznych braci (rodzeństwa mężczyzn), którzy:

✅ ukończyli 31 lat,
✅ mają różnicę wieku nie większą niż 5 lat.

Udział polega na stacjonarnym teście technologicznym realizowanym w Warszawie (Praga-Południe). Badanie dotyczy oceny skuteczności nowej technologii.

📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa, Praga-Południe
⏱ Czas trwania: około 120 minut
💰 Wynagrodzenie: 285 zł dla każdej osoby, płatne przelewem przez firmę realizującą badanie
📅 Termin: do ustalenia (możliwe terminy już w czerwcu)

Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na adres:
📧 impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com

W zgłoszeniu prosimy podać:
• numer telefonu do siebie i do brata,
• imię i nazwisko swoje oraz brata,
• aktualne zdjęcie każdej osoby biorącej udział w badaniu.

W temacie wiadomości prosimy wpisać:
„Badanie”.

Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń!

items.text:
CREATIVE SUPPORT CIRCLE

A Psychology & Personal Growth Workshop for Artists, Performers and Creatives

Being creative can be exciting, meaningful and deeply fulfilling.

It can also be isolating.

Many artists, performers, freelancers and creative professionals experience self-doubt, burnout, creative blocks, performance anxiety, uncertainty and the pressure of constantly creating while trying to build a sustainable life.

Creative Support Circle is a supportive space where creatives can explore these challenges together in a respectful and confidential environment.

This introductory workshop is designed for people who create, perform, teach, write, build projects or simply want to reconnect with their creativity and personal growth.

Through guided discussion, reflection and practical psychological tools, participants will have the opportunity to better understand themselves, connect with others facing similar challenges and develop healthier ways of navigating the creative journey.

WHAT TO EXPECT

• Guided discussions and reflection

• Practical psychological insights and tools

• Conversations about creativity, motivation and well-being

• A supportive and respectful group environment

• Connection with fellow artists, performers and creatives

• An opportunity to help shape future workshops based on the group's needs

FACILITATED BY

Begüm Karausta, MA Clinical Psychologist

Begüm Karausta is a Clinical Psychologist based in Warsaw with experience supporting both international and Polish clients.

Alongside her private practice, she works with employees of major organizations across Poland, helping people navigate life transitions, workplace challenges, relationships, emotional well-being and personal development.

Her approach combines professional psychological knowledge with practical tools that participants can apply in everyday life.

WHO IS THIS FOR?

• Artists

• Comedians

• Actors

• Musicians

• Writers

• Facilitators

• Creative entrepreneurs

• Freelancers

• Performers

• Anyone seeking personal growth while pursuing a creative path

WORKSHOP DETAILS

📅 Monday, July 6

🕔 17:00 – 19:00

📍 Praga Południe, Warsaw

(Exact address shared after registration)

LIMITED TO 10 PARTICIPANTS

To ensure a meaningful and high-quality experience, this workshop is intentionally limited to 10 participants only.

The small-group format allows everyone to actively participate, be heard and benefit from deeper discussion and interaction

IMPORTANT

This workshop is intended for education, personal growth and community support.

It is not psychotherapy, psychological treatment or a healthcare service.

A space to reflect.

A space to connect.

A space to grow.

@impactwarsaw

impactwarsaw.com

Inner Circle Telegram:

https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk

items.text: bongoproductions.com

sharedPost.text:
“Michael is an integral reason that I am now on a focused artistic path as a performer. As a late bloomer to this industry, I enrolled in his Certificate Program (with agent referral) on the advice of a friend and Michael’s insight, direction and sensitivity combined with the fact that he’s such a great guy, gave me the foundation to create a demo reel of our work together and a package that attracted the kind of agent attention for which I could have only dreamed. In addition to fulfilling my initial goals, a very important part of this picture is that I also had so much fun in the process.”

-Stacey Bernstein, Toronto Actor

DATES FOR JULY SCENE-STUDY CLASS - THURSDAYS, JULY 2,9,16,23. 6-9pm.

In this Scene-study class, we’re preparing and taping scenes, telling compelling stories, reviewing foundational process preparation techniques. I coach you on-camera, focusing on screen acting skills and technique. We’re using 2 cameras.

I offer an inspirational class, exploring the range and development of your talent.

Sign up now to revitalize your screen acting experience. The cost for this series of 4, 3 hr classes is $299 +tx.

For more information or to sign up, call or text: 416 294-3754 or email: bongoproductions@rogers.com

Come train with actor and coach, Michael Caruana. Expert guidance and coaching, trusted, since 1996, at bongo productions.

Private Coaching.
Scene-study.
Audition Technique.

Comprehensive training with our Certificate Program.

bongo productions is a proud member of AACE! (Association of Acting Coaches and Educators)

items.text:
🎬 **1 Day Adult Intro to the American Accent — Brisbane**
*An intensive with Sandra Bell*

Learn from one of Australia's most experienced dialect coaches — and walk away with showreel footage.

📅 **Saturday 27 June 2026**
🕙 **10am – 4:30pm**
📍 **Queensland Headshots, 1192 Stanley St East, Coorparoo QLD**
💵 **$260 standard | $240 returning students** (GST inc.)

**What's included:**
* Hands-on American accent coaching: placement, rhythm and the sounds that give it away
* Targeted exercises that build the accent into your body, not just your ear
* Performance work with scenes on their feet, under real pressure
* A filmed US accent scene captured on the day
* A green screen newsreader scene, edited and delivered
* Showreel-ready footage you can submit straight away

**About Sandra Bell:**
32 years as one of Australia's most sought-after American accent dialect coaches. 1,000+ students. National workshops. 18 years teaching 3rd year drama students at QUT. 20+ years with TAFTA.

⚠️ **Only 12 places. Minimum 8 for the day to run.**

👉 Book at queenslandheadshots.com/sandrabell
📧 [info@queenslandheadshots.com](mailto:info@queenslandheadshots.com) | 📞 0403 871 686

CASTING CALL: JESSICA — Supernatural Horror Feature Film

Non-Union
Rate: $200/day
Shooting location: Winnipeg, MB
Shoot dates: July 2026

Roles:
Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · must read as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · must read as 7
Olivia — Supporting · Female · must read as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s — CAST
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s — CAST

The roles of Ken and David have been cast. Please do not apply for those roles.

Role Commitments:
Susie — 12 shoot days
Jacob — 12 shoot days
Jessica — 8 shoot days
Olivia — 2 shoot days

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m 22 years old, based in Durham, and looking to get back into acting.

I have previous acting experience and was fortunate enough to appear in Hi-de-Hi!. Since moving up North, I’m keen to get involved in acting again and am currently looking for paid opportunities in TV, film, commercials, theatre, or other productions.

I’m reliable, enthusiastic, and eager to build on my experience while working with new people and productions.

If anyone knows of any paid acting roles, auditions, casting calls, or opportunities in and around Durham and the North East, I’d really appreciate hearing from you.

Please feel free to comment or send me a message.

Thank you! 🎭

items.text:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

items.summary:
**LAPLANDUK CASTING CALL - FATHER CHRISTMAS**  

LaplandUK are seeking performers to bring to life the pivotal role of Father Christmas.  

A warm, charismatic, and deeply believable embodiment of the beloved festive figure at the heart of the LaplandUK experience. 

LaplandUK is an immersive theatrical experience, mixing scripted shows and improvised interactions, inspired by the original stories written by Alison Battle and Mike Battle. At its heart lies a child’s fleeting belief in Father Christmas, Mother Christmas, and the magical Elven world they call home, a world brought vividly to life through richly woven storytelling and theatrical spectacle.   

**ROLE DETAILS ** 
Father Christmas Pay: £20.50 per hour (training & live show)  
£50 daily subsidy per working day  
Rehearsal days approx. 8 hours 

**AUDITION DATES ** 
London (Camberley Theatre) 
Monday 8th – Friday 12th June  

Manchester (Capesthorne Hall) 
Monday 15th – Friday 19th June 

Audition slots are limited and filling quickly, therefore, to be considered, please complete either the London or Manchester application form below and we’ll send full audition details and next steps. 

**LONDON** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-an…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Ascot-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Ascot-2026/125) 

**MANCHESTER** 
[https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Gr…](https://laplanduk.avature.net/careersmarketplace/JobDetail/Manchester-Cheshire-United-Kingdom-of-Great-Britain-and-Northern-Ireland-Father-Christmas-Manchester-2026/126) 

If you have any questions, please contact [eventhr@lapland.group](mailto:eventhr@lapland.group)

items.text:
Most artists only see the finished performance.

This is your chance to step inside the process.

Join now a unique opportunity: a three day residency focused on creating immersive, participatory, and atmospheric performance. Designed for artists who feel there is more to unlock in their practice, this residency offers hands on exploration of space, audience interaction, narrative, and performance making to craft intimate and transformative encounters.

Through guided tasks, improvisation, movement, and sensory investigation, you will explore how bodies, objects, text, and environments generate meaning through interaction. The work centres on presence, participation, and refining how audiences become active contributors within a performance experience. 

Perfect for theatre students, performers, directors and theatre makers looking to deepen their understanding of immersive performance and contribute to the development of a new immersive work.

Wants to read more about it:

https://viniciussalles.co.uk/?p=2905

THE POETICS OF SPACE

3 DAY RESIDENCY

📍 Colab Tower, London

📅 22, 23 & 24 June

⚠️ Places are limited

🔗 Bookings here:

https://viniciussalles.co.uk/?p=2852

A moment to go further.

Explore the intersection of body, space, participation, and the other.

.

.

.

#ImmersiveTheatre #physicaltheatre #ActorTraining #DanceTraining #ArtistDevelopment #ContemporaryPerformance #Punchdrunk #GeckoTheatre #JasminVardimon #LondonTheatre #UKTheatre #ArtsCouncilEngland

items.text:
🎭 HELLO ACTORS! 🎭

I'll be attending the Actors & Filmmakers Networking Event at HOME, Manchester, on 28th June (2:00pm–6:30pm), where I'll be connecting with actors and sharing information about my Catbirding behavioural characterisation methodology and coaching services.

If you're interested in developing deeper character understanding and performance skills, it would be great to meet you there.

My book is due for release at the end of the month, with free workshops launching in July. Feel free to follow me for updates, workshop dates, and training opportunities.

Find out more at:
www.catbirding.com

Tickets available via Eventbrite:
https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/actors-and-filmmakers-networking-event-tickets-1983730891497?utm_id=97758_v0_s00_e0_tv2_a1den5evana2l0&fbclid=IwY2xjawSeJ4NleHRuA2FlbQIxMABzcnRjBmFwcF9pZBAyMjIwMzkxNzg4MjAwODkyAAEet3js64JVJfMf_pZJ9rEIsWcKTxqSXvpLd3Yis3Dc_gfXCk8AnkTrT2GsnmE_aem_Vdbf-_liRKQ6QF8yo8ByEg

Hope to see you there! 😊

items.text:
Każdy moment ma znaczenie! Twój jest właśnie teraz! Mamy casting do reklamy znanej sieci sklepów spożywczych!

! MOŻLIWA DŁUŻSZA WSPÓŁPRACA !

Do reklamy sieci znanych sklepów spożywczych poszukujemy:

(osoby sprawne aktorsko z zacięciem komediowym)

ANIA (20–25 lat)
Naturalna dziewczyna z sąsiedztwa, typowa przedstawicielka pokolenia Z. Swobodna, autentyczna, bez przesadnej stylizacji. Naturalne włosy, wygodne ubrania – szerokie jeansy, oversize'owe bluzy, sneakersy.
Ciekawa świata, zawsze na bieżąco z trendami i nowościami. Chętnie testuje nowe produkty i limitowane edycje. Energiczna, konkretna, bezpośrednia i bardzo sympatyczna.

PIOTREK (22–26 lat)
Zwyczajny chłopak o luźnym, niewymuszonym stylu. T-shirt lub longsleeve, rozpinana bluza, szerokie jeansy lub sztruksy, klasyczne trampki.
Wyluzowany, inteligentny i technologicznie ogarnięty. Lubi aplikacje, promocje, memy i internetowy humor. Ma naturalne poczucie humoru, jest spokojny, lojalny i stanowi świetny balans dla bardziej energicznej Ani.

STAWKA:
od 6 000 zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
DLA WSZYSTKICH: WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:
18.06 czwartek godz 12.00 termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń na maila

22.06.2026 poniedziałek RECALL

30.06 i/lub 01.07 zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie sceny proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 075

Link do castingu + sceny + szerszy opis postaci:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting075/

To jak? Gotowy na swoje 5 minut? Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!
items.title: 🐸 Każdy moment ma znaczenie. Twój jest teraz! Weź udział w castingu dla znanej sieci sklepów spożywczych! 🐸 – UNAGI MEDIA

PIOTREK (22–26 lat)
Zwyczajny chłopak o luźnym, niewymuszonym stylu. T-shirt lub longsleeve, rozpinana bluza, szerokie jeansy lub sztruksy, klasyczne trampki.
Wyluzowany, inteligentny i technologicznie ogarnięty. Lubi aplikacje, promocje, memy i internetowy humor. Ma naturalne poczucie humoru, jest spokojny, lojalny i stanowi świetny balans dla bardziej energicznej Ani.

STAWKA:
od 6 000 zł !

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
DLA WSZYSTKICH: WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:
18.06 czwartek godz 12.00 termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń na maila

22.06.2026 poniedziałek RECALL

30.06 i/lub 01.07 zdjęcia w Warszawie

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie sceny proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 075

Link do castingu + sceny + szerszy opis postaci:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting075/

To jak? Gotowy na swoje 5 minut? Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1. Tosia (18) – wygląd “zwykłej dziewczyny” - która niczym się nie wyróżnia, uczennica dobrej szkoły z mundurkami - zabójczyni 
Data: 30.06 i 01.07
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość 

2. Tatiana Bojko (28) - Ukrainka, gosposia, atrakcyjna, zgrabna, zadbana. 
Data: 30.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Kamila (42) – Ma kancelarię prawną. Wygląd inteligencki, ubrana z klasą.
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł za całość 

4. Ewa Brodzka (45) – Prawniczka, zadbana i strojąca się - wiarygodna “żona Wilanowa”. Traktuje innych z wyższością KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 30.06 i 01.07
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość 

5. Mirosława Gawek (60-70) – starsza, zdezorientowana kobieta, niewiele wie o życiu syna. 
Data: 01.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

6. Mundurowa 1. 
Data: 30. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

items.text:
Do czerwcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mundurowy Edward (30) – Funkcjonariusz przepytujący sąsiadów pod domem.
Data: 30.06
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

2. Robert Gawek (35) – Krętacz notowany za oszustwa, nie jest typowym zbirem-mięśniakiem, raczej chudym, żylastym szczurem o aparycji cwaniaka który siedzi przy kompie. 
Data: 01.07 i 04.07
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość 

3. Dawid Kowara (37) – bandyta średniego szczebla, trochę mniej bystry. Silny, przypakowany. Lubi przestępcze życie, zawsze chętny do działania więc ma sporo za uszami, ale poza odsiedzianym wyrokiem 3 lata za wymuszenie, nic mu nie udowodniono.  
Data: 29.06 i 30.06
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

4. Albert Moński (39) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, zdecydowany w działaniu. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. W przeszłości dostał 5 lat za rozbój. W więzieniu bardzo się wycwanił, dlatego po wyjściu nic mu już nigdy nie udowodniono. Energiczny w zachowaniu (pada w tekście).  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Daty: 29.06 i 30.06 
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

5. Paweł Brodzki (45) – Prawnik, schludny i przystojny, nosi garnitury. Typ atrakcyjnego faceta w średnim wieku - głowy rodziny.
Daty: 30.06, 01.07 i 04.07
Stawka: 2100 zł netto za całość

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

items.text:
🦖✨ THE ROARSOME DINO ADVENTURE IS COMING! ✨🦖

Step back in time for a Jurassic day of roar-some fun at The Grand! Join our friendly dinosaur palaeontologists and explore a prehistoric world packed with adventure, discovery, and dino magic!

Get creative with Dino mask making, dig for ancient treasures in the Dino fossil dig, and train to become a top explorer in Roar ranger training! Then enjoy the thrilling Dino show before dancing the day away at the Dino disco 🪩🦖

Meet our giant prehistoric friends up close in the magical Dinos meet and greet, and don’t forget to capture the moment at our photo opportunity!

📅 Sunday 12th July
📍 The Grand
💷 £10 per person

⏰ Session Times:
11:00am – 1:30pm
3:00pm – 5:30pm

A roar-some family adventure you won’t want to miss! 🌿🦖✨

items.previewTitle:
If you're interested, email us (see bio) with your CV and headshots!

Before It’s All Over is a new original comedy drama centring on four friends who, facing a number of issues ranging from dissertation deadlines, pushy parents, identity and self-destructive behaviour, learn that a meteorite is set to hit the Earth. Deciding to go out with a figurative bang before the literal one, they decide to finish out their lives with a final party.
items.title:

items.text:
Hello friends! 

We are casting our net again for CASTING! 
The Speakeasy Murder, after 200 shows in Orlando, FL, has now opened its doors in Buena Park, CA! We are currently running at 3 nights a week and will be expanding to 4 / 5 this summer. Pay is per show and paid every two weeks. 

We are looking to expand our CA actors pool, and are looking for strong actors with honest comedy chops (who can get down with some occasional audience interaction and improv)  

We are seeking a collective of types:

Female - Identifying actors who can sing - playing age 29-40 - diva with history

Female - Identifying actors who can sing - playing age 21-30 - ingenue type, has some voices in her head at times

Drag Performers- think brash Monty Python OR RuPaul Glam Queens, our doors and minds are open to what YOU bring to the table 

Male - Identifying actor who can sing - playing age 21-35 - suave ladies man who can charm with a smile

Male - Identifying actor who can sing- playing age 50+  - imposing, definitely someone dabbling in the crime scene 

Male - Identifying actor - playing age 35-50 - strong, body guard type. Must be comfortable breaking 4th wall and interacting with audience 

Male - Identifying actor - playing age 30+ - strong comedic timing, frustrated musical director (that says it all, actually) 

Please send me your headshot, resume, acting / vocal / drag reel to be considered:

Brandid@speakeasymurder.com

Casting immediately for two of my 10-Minute Plays, The F Word and El Sereno Sound, part of the Brisk Festival 2026 Aug/Sept in Santa Monica

1- Trans Woman in her late 20’s - 30’s for The F-Word.

2- Looking for a female actor with strong vocal and accapella abilities for my play called El Sereno Sound.

All details and more info on flyers.
Rehearsals start next week.

items.text:
Cześć.
Na sobotę,  20 czerwca poszukuję młodych ludzi w wieku 22-40 lat do statystowania w Trudnych Sprawach . Eleganccy kobiety i mężczyźni jako pracownicy korporacji . Trzy sceny od godz 14-17. Płatność gotówką po planie. Że względów proceduralnych, proszę osoby tylko z polskim obywatelstwa. Zgłoszenia proszę kierować pod numer telefonu 506499549. 

Zapraszam

SPRAWIEDLIWI TRÓJMIASTO🎬

Poszukujemy do epizodu 2 dziewczyn w wieku 20–30 lat.

🔹 Wymaganie:
✂️ Krótkie włosy – długość krótsza niż do ramion.

📅 Termin: 18.06
📍 Miejsce: Wrocław

👩 Kogo szukamy?
Kobiet w wieku 20–30 lat z Wrocławia i okolic.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na adres:
zuza.wroclaw@studioabm.com.pl

W wiadomości warto dołączyć aktualne zdjęcia, wizytówkę oraz numer kontaktowy.

Kasia
Studio ABM

items.text:
🎬 MODELKA – WARSZAWA 🎬

Poszukujemy standinki/modelki do realizacji nowego filmu fabularnego.

📅 Termin: 13 czerwca 2026 r. (sobota)
📍 Lokalizacja: Warszawa
💰 Stawka: 140 zł
⏱ Czas pracy: do 7 godzin

🔎 Wymagania:
• wiek 16–18 lat
• uroda słowiańska
• blond włosy
• ciemna oprawa oczu

ℹ️ Informacje dodatkowe:
• wizerunek oraz głos nie będą wykorzystywane w filmie
• doświadczenie nie jest wymagane

📧 Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy mailowo: ludzie@unagimedia.pl 

W tytule wiadomości wpisz: **MODELKA**

W treści maila prosimy o podanie:
• imienia i nazwiska
• wieku
• wzrostu
• aktualnego zdjęcia portretowego
• aktualnego zdjęcia sylwetki

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
Wo Gestaltung auf Darstellung trifft.

Wir freuen uns sehr, Marco Marcu als Hausvogt auf der Bühne und als Designer hinter den Kulissen Teil unseres Jedermann-Ensembles zu wissen. Zu seinen Entwürfen zählen unter anderem das Kleid der Buhlschaft und das des Glaubens.

Informationen & Tickets:

www.jedermann-theater.de

items.summary:
Wo Gestaltung auf Darstellung trifft.

Wir freuen uns sehr, Marco Marcu als Hausvogt auf der Bühne und als Designer hinter den Kulissen Teil unseres Jedermann-Ensembles zu wissen. Zu seinen Entwürfen zählen unter anderem das Kleid der Buhlschaft und das des Glaubens.

Informationen & Tickets:

www.jedermann-theater.de

items.text:
🎬 DFW ACTOR AVAILABLE FOR FILM, TV, COMMERCIAL & STUDENT PROJECTS 🎬

Hello everyone!

My name is Odavian Swiney, and I am an 18-year-old actor currently based in the Dallas-Fort Worth area.

I bring nearly a decade of performance experience, with a background in acting, singing, and dance. My theater credits include productions such as Chicago, Newsies, Fences, The Wiz, and Once on This Island. I have also received professional training through programs including Stella Adler, 3-2-1 Acting Studios, and Young Actors Studio.

Originally from South Central Los Angeles, I am passionate about authentic storytelling and portraying characters with depth, heart, and truth. Whether it's drama, comedy, coming-of-age stories, faith-based projects, independent films, student films, or commercial work, I am always excited to collaborate with passionate creatives.

📍 Based in DFW
🎭 Actor | Singer | Dancer
📏 6'0"
🎬 Open to short films, feature films, commercials, web series, and new media projects

I would love to connect with local filmmakers, casting directors, producers, and fellow creatives.

Feel free to message me directly regarding auditions, casting opportunities, or collaborations.

Thank you for your time and consideration!

#DFWActors #TexasActors #DallasActors #FortWorthActors #CastingCall #ActorForHire #IndependentFilm #StudentFilm #FilmMaking #DFWFilmMakers #ActorsAccess

items.text:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

#VoiceOver #VoiceActing #Animation #Gaming #IrishVoiceActor Audiobooks PBLVoiceover VoiceoverTraining Acting Performance GenshinImpact GameVoiceActor

items.text:
🌹✨ Meine neue Homepage ist online! ✨🌹

Mit großer Freude möchte ich euch meine neue Webseite vorstellen:

🌐 https://sabrina-kreativprojekte.beepworld.de/

Auf dieser Seite nehme ich euch mit auf meine kreative Reise als Autorin und Projektentwicklerin.

📖 Geschichten und Buchprojekte
🎭 Theater, Bühne und Kreativität
🎵 Musik- und Songprojekte
✨ IMPÉRIA – LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE
💡 Visionen und Herzensprojekte

🚧 Die Webseite befindet sich aktuell noch im Aufbau und wird von mir nahezu täglich erweitert und weiterentwickelt.

📝 Besonders würde ich mich freuen, wenn ihr mir einen Eintrag in meinem Gästebuch hinterlasst. Jeder Gruß, jedes Feedback und jeder Gedanke bedeuten mir sehr viel und helfen mir, meinen kreativen Weg weiterzugehen.

Vielen Dank für euren Besuch und eure Unterstützung. ❤️

🌹 Sabrina van der Felden
Autorin & Kreativprojekte

Diese Webseite gibt Einblicke in meine kreativen Arbeiten, meine Visionen und die Welt von IMPÉRIA- LUMIÈRE ÉTERNELLE. Kreativität bedeutet für mich, Ideen lebendig werden zu lassen, Menschen zu berühren und neue Welten zu erschaffen. Ich freue mich, Sie auf meiner kreativen Reise begrüßen zu dürfen. Herzlichst Sabrina van der Felden Autorin & Kreativprojekte'

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL -** *That's Deeply Human*

*That's Deeply Human* is a short film currently in pre-production, shooting in Bournemouth this summer. It's a contemporary psychological drama about a young woman who moves to a new city and slowly loses her ability to feel things without outsourcing her emotions.

It's funny, it's real, and by the end it's devastating in the way only very ordinary things can be.

**THE ROLE**
Anna is in her late 20s. Warm, clumsy, genuinely funny, and quietly falling apart. She wants connection more than almost anything. This is a lead role with significant screen time. We're looking for someone who can carry comedy and devastation in equal measure.

**THE PRODUCTION**
This is a **voluntary** student thesis production from Bournemouth University's MA Filmmaking programme. Expenses like food and travel will be covered. The film will be submitted to festivals upon completion.

If this sounds like you, or someone you know, we'd love to hear from you. Please send a recent headshot, any self-tape or showreel material, and a short note about yourself and your interest in the role.

DM or contact at

qaldasm@gmail.com

utkuafacan1@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'casting call A Bournemouth BournemouthUliversty/MastrsPod Bour University Masters Production LEAD ROLE FEMALE Anna: 20s-30s Contact: qaldasm@gmail.com .com utkuafacan1@gmail.com utkuafacan 1@gmail.com That Deeply Human is a contemporary short film about a young woman who moves to a new city and slowly loses her ability to process her own emotions without the mediation of AI. It's funny, it' S quiet, and it's devastating. That's Deeply That'sDeeplyHuman Human 主 Filming Dates: Beginning of July'

🤣"If you make me laugh hard enough (which isn't difficult), I'll cry and develop an extreme case of hiccups... it's quite the experience for everyone involved."

Next up in our individual spotlights is the amazing Lauren Bates, who will take to the stage in the iconic role of Mina Harker this October!

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

sharedPost.text:
🤣"If you make me laugh hard enough (which isn't difficult), I'll cry and develop an extreme case of hiccups... it's quite the experience for everyone involved."

Next up in our individual spotlights is the amazing Lauren Bates, who will take to the stage in the iconic role of Mina Harker this October!

🎭 About Lauren
While Lauren has performed in many musicals and pantomimes over the years, Dracula will mark her very first straight play since high school! Her fantastic recent stage credits include Ensemble in Joseph and the Amazing Technicolour Dreamcoat, Jack in Jack and the Beanstalk, Ariel in Return to the Forbidden Planet (all with WAMDS), the Three Little Pigs in Shrek (RMTC), and the Bandersnatch in Alice in Wonderland (WAMDS).
🦇 On Playing Mina
"I am thrilled to be playing Mina Harker. Mina is intelligent, determined, and fiercely independent. As she challenges the expectations placed upon her, she discovers the strength to define her own future. Her story is truly captivating, and I'm really excited to bring her strength, courage, and resilience to the stage."
🤪 Did you know?
Outside of theatre and her comedic hiccups, Lauren enjoys field hockey and regularly competes in extreme sports such as bottomless brunching 👀. 
She is also fluent in sarcasm, although to her dismay, unfortunately not everyone is bilingual. 

🩸 Dracula: A Feminist Revenge Fantasy, Really by Kate Hamill
📅 29–31 October 2026
📍 St Aidan's, Rochdale

#DarkTheatreRochdale #Dracula #FeministTheatre #UKAmateurPremiere #MeetTheCast

🎬 CASTING CALL – MODELS REQUIRED | CHISWICK, LONDON

We are a London-based marketing agency looking for male & female models (18–27) for a restaurant lifestyle content shoot.

🍽️ Concept:

Friends enjoying food, drinks, dancing & creating fun social media content + testimonial videos.

📅 Date: Thursday

⏰ Time: 2:00 PM

📍 Location: Chiswick, London

💷 Pay: £15–£20 per hour

🍽️ Food & refreshments provided

✅ Requirements:

• Age 18–27

• Confident on camera

• Bring 4–5 outfits (party wear/smart casual)

• Able to give a short self-intro video

• Must be available full shoot

⭐ Bonus:

🎬 WE'RE HIRING! 🎭

JK Performing Arts is looking for an enthusiastic and committed Screen & Television Acting Teacher to join our growing team!

Based at Mycenae House, Greenwich, this is an exciting opportunity to lead a brand-new weekly class and inspire the next generation of young performers.

We're looking for someone who:�✨ Has experience in screen and television acting�✨ Is passionate about teaching children and young people�✨ Is reliable, professional, and committed�✨ Can create engaging, confidence-building classes
Join our amazing children's theatre school and help our students develop their on-screen performance skills in a fun, supportive environment.

📍 Location: Mycenae House, Greenwich�📅 Weekly Class

For more information, contact Jenny on 07909 964971
📧 Please send your CV to: jkperformingarts@gmail.com

We'd love to hear from you!

items.text:
Poszukujemy bohaterek do nowego programu realizowanego dla stacji telewizyjnej.

1. Szukamy dwóch kobiet w wieku 35+, najlepiej prawdziwych koleżanek, które łączy autentyczna relacja. Idealnym scenariuszem byłoby, gdyby przed laty chodziły razem do liceum lub szkoły- Nie jest to jednak warunek konieczny. Najważniejsze jest, aby była między nimi naturalna chemia, wspólna historia i swoboda w kontakcie ze sobą. Bo będą wspólnie występować w odcinku i siebie wspierać w wyborach stylizacji.

2. Tematem odcinka będzie metamorfoza modowa. Nasze bohaterki, przy wsparciu stylistów, będą poszukiwać idealnego stylu dopasowanego do konkretnego wydarzenia. W tym przypadku będzie to zjazd absolwentów dawnego liceum, do którego uczęszczały i teraz wspólnie na taki zjazd pojadą.

3. Zdjęcia planujemy zrealizować już 4 lipca w Warszawie i będą to całodniowe nagrania.

4. Wynagrodzenie, jakie proponujemy: 700 zł netto/osoba. Razem 2 osoby 1 400 zł netto (płatne w ciągu 1 dnia po nagraniach — BLIK/konto bankowe)

5. Szukamy osób, które nie są kojarzone z wcześniejszych udziałów w popularnych programach telewizyjnych, reality shows czy serialach. Chcemy pracować z autentycznymi bohaterkami, z którymi widzowie będą mogli się utożsamić.

Dodatkowo zależałoby nam, aby po zakończeniu zdjęć uczestniczki nie pojawiały się przez około 2–3 miesiące w innych programach telewizyjnych lub serialach, które mogłyby wpłynąć na odbiór ich udziału w naszym formacie.

6. Będziemy potrzebowali krótkich filmów zgłoszeniowych od kandydatek. Program opiera się w dużej mierze na relacjach, emocjach i rozmowach z bohaterkami, dlatego bardzo zależy nam na osobach, które czują się swobodnie przed kamerą i potrafią naturalnie opowiadać o sobie.

W razie zainteresowania, spełnienia wymagań i dostępności w dniu 4 lipca, prosimy o wysłanie zgłoszenia, podając następujące informację dwóch osób:

1. Imię i nazwisko swoje i koleżanki/przyjaciółki

2. Rok urodzenia obu pań

3. Miasto zamieszkania

4. Telefon kontaktowy

5. Adres e-mail

6. Wzrost obu pań

8. Link do swojego profilu na Facebooku oraz koleżanki/przyjaciółki

9. Krótki opis dotychczasowego doświadczenia

10. Krótkie nagranie video wraz z podstawowymi informacjami o relacji. Najlepiej, jeśli będzie to nagranie dwóch koleżanek.

11. Minimum po 1 zdjęć z każdej pań

Kontakt: rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl

W temacie wiadomości prosimy napisać: Kampania

Wysłanie zgłoszenie jest jednoznaczne z wyrażeniem zgody na przetwarzanie danych osobowych w celu udziału w programie zgodnie z Rozporządzeniem Parlamentu Europejskiego i Rady (UE) 2016/679 z dnia 27 kwietnia 2016 r. w sprawie ochrony osób fizycznych w związku z przetwarzaniem danych osobowych i w sprawie swobodnego przepływu takich danych oraz uchylenia dyrektywy 95/46/WE (ogólne rozporządzenie o ochronie danych). Administratorem Twoich danych osobowych pozyskanych w procesie rekrutacyjnym jest Agencja Artystyczna INFERNAL. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne, w każdej chwili przysługuje Ci prawo do wglądu do danych, ich poprawiania lub usunięcia. Kontakt do administratora rekrutacja@agencjainfernal.pl.

items.title: Poszukujemy bohaterek do nowego programu realizowanego dla stacji telewizyjnej.

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

1. Tosia (18) – wygląd “zwykłej dziewczyny” - która niczym się nie wyróżnia, uczennica dobrej szkoły z mundurkami - zabójczyni 
Data: 30.06 i 01.07
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość 

2. Tatiana Bojko (28) - Ukrainka, gosposia, atrakcyjna, zgrabna, zadbana. 
Data: 30.06
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Kamila (42) – Ma kancelarię prawną. Wygląd inteligencki, ubrana z klasą.
Data: 29. i 30. czerwca
Stawka: 600 zł za całość 

4. Ewa Brodzka (45) – Prawniczka, zadbana i strojąca się - wiarygodna “żona Wilanowa”. Traktuje innych z wyższością KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 30.06 i 01.07
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość 

5. Mirosława Gawek (60-70) – starsza, zdezorientowana kobieta, niewiele wie o życiu syna. 
Data: 01.07
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

6. Mundurowa 1. 
Data: 30. czerwca
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę materiał ze scenariusza do nagrania)
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.title: Do kolejnego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujących ról:

items.text:
Do czerwcowego odcinka serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Mundurowy Edward (30) – Funkcjonariusz przepytujący sąsiadów pod domem.
Data: 30.06
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

2. Robert Gawek (35) – Krętacz notowany za oszustwa, nie jest typowym zbirem-mięśniakiem, raczej chudym, żylastym szczurem o aparycji cwaniaka który siedzi przy kompie. 
Data: 01.07 i 04.07
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość 

3. Dawid Kowara (37) – bandyta średniego szczebla, trochę mniej bystry. Silny, przypakowany. Lubi przestępcze życie, zawsze chętny do działania więc ma sporo za uszami, ale poza odsiedzianym wyrokiem 3 lata za wymuszenie, nic mu nie udowodniono.  
Data: 29.06 i 30.06
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

4. Albert Moński (39) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, zdecydowany w działaniu. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. W przeszłości dostał 5 lat za rozbój. W więzieniu bardzo się wycwanił, dlatego po wyjściu nic mu już nigdy nie udowodniono. Energiczny w zachowaniu (pada w tekście).  KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Daty: 29.06 i 30.06 
Stawka: 1400 zł za całość 

5. Paweł Brodzki (45) – Prawnik, schludny i przystojny, nosi garnitury. Typ atrakcyjnego faceta w średnim wieku - głowy rodziny.
Daty: 30.06, 01.07 i 04.07
Stawka: 2100 zł netto za całość

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — STUDENT SHORT FILM “GUTTER”**

We are MA students at the University of East London and we’re looking for actors to feature in our upcoming student short film, **Gutter**.

**Roles needed:**
* Male, 20–30, Indian, Hindi-speaking — Lead
* Male, 45–60 — Supporting role
* Boy, 10–15 — Supporting role

**Location:** London 🇬🇧
**Language:** Hindi
**Shooting Month:** July
**Shoot Duration:** Approx. 3–4 days
**Type:** Student short film

**Logline:**
With his visa expiring, an aspiring Bollywood actor faces a cruel choice: go home and pursue his dream, or remain illegally in London and sacrifice it all to save his family from the gutters.

To apply, please email your **headshot + showreel or self-tape **

**link** to **neelchampaneri09@gmail.com**
Or contact **+44 7771 041656**

✨ We’re Always Looking for Creators / Models / Performers (London) ✨
We’re always interested in connecting with female creators, models and performers for upcoming paid short-form content shoots in London.

📍 Location: Central London

🕒 Rate: £30 per hour

🎬 Shoot type: Social media short-form videos for a mum & baby brand

⏰ Sessions are typically 2–3 hours

We’re especially interested in people who are confident on camera and feel comfortable creating natural, lifestyle-style content.

Whether you’re a creator, performer, model, or simply have a great on-camera presence, we’d love to hear from you.

Interested? Please send your CV or Spotlight/Mandy profile, portfolio to:

nandina07@outlook.com

Many thanks!

NOWY PROGRAM KULINARNY NIE CZEKAJ, ZGŁOŚ SIĘ JUŻ DZIŚ!
Lubisz gotować? 

Zgłoś się do nowego programu kulinarnego! 

Szukamy osób solo oraz duetów – rodzin, par, rodzeństw i przyjaciół. 

Jeśli gotowanie sprawia Ci przyjemność, czekamy właśnie na Ciebie. 

Na uczestników czekają nagrody! 

Napisz do mnie w wiadomości prywatnej, a ja opowiem o szczegółach. 

Zuza

items.text:
Siemacie.

 W gwoli ścisłości, gdybyście czasem mieli już dość Sebastiana Slumza i jego bandycko memicznej jaźwy w tv POLSAT, przykręcam śrubę jeszcze bardziej i robię desant tym razem stricte muzyczny niż aktorski. 

 Przypominam, że to nie debiut ponieważ lata temu na ESKA TV w audycji #RapTime hasał już singiel z klipem do klasyki ''Osterdam''.

Teraz wracamy do ostatniej LP ''Estyma'', którą popełniłem w kolabo z PE Beatz i numer ''Błądzę'' otrzymuję swój czas antenowy już w ten czwartek 18 czerwca na Mixtapetv! po 23. 👊😎

 Utwór ''Błądzę'' mówi o potrzebie odnalezienia siebie w ciągle zmieniającym się świecie, bez konieczności zatracania się w rozproszeniach współczesności.

 Autorem klipu jak i współtwórcą scenariusza jest niezawodny Maciej Emka Kubacki, z którym dopiero tak naprawdę zacząłem robić teledyski na serio. Będzie to już drugi? nasz oficjalny klip emitowany w tv. 

 Zatem big zapro przed szkiełko dla każdego, kto jeszcze nie widział tego obrazu. ✊

 Chyba nie ma lepszego promo niż polskie mass media, które przez ostatnie dekady były hermetycznie zamknięte na cięższą odmianę Rapu. 

 Z tego miejsca pragnę odgórnie podziękować kru Mixtapetv!!, za docenienie twórczości ostrowskiego patusa w którego i tak większość bażantów nie wierzy. ;)

 Ekspansja wzrasta. 
Oczekujcie mnie jak zmartwychwstania Pańskiego ponieważ wrócę tu mocniejszy niczym The Terminator/Arnold Schwarzenegger 💪😎

Ten czwartek. 
18 czerwiec. 
Po godz 23:00 
Tylko na Mixtapetv!!

Na takie rzeczy pracuję się latami...

Dobrego wieczoru na Farta ✊

@obserwujący
@liderzy wśród fanów

items.text:
**Do you ever feel like a song says it better than you ever could?**

**NOW CASTING — New York City & Surrounding**

**We're looking for music lovers in NYC who have someone special in their life they've always wanted to honor but never quite found the words. A parent. A best friend. A partner. A person who changed everything.**

**We want to turn your story into a personalized love song.**

**No music experience necessary (our professionals will handle that). Just need a great story and a whole lot of heart. Who would you write a song for?**

**1-2 hour (in person) commitment in the city. Must be able to self report! Exact date/location is TBD, estimated late June or early July shoot date. Compensation: $150 Flat Rate + customized song. For more details please email: ****[jess.w.casting@gmail.com](mailto:jess.w.casting@gmail.com)**

items.text:
CASTING CALL - FEMALE ACTOR / MODEL

Music Video

I am looking for an actress/model for my music video for a song I will release at the beginning of July. As the song is unreleased, I will send it once I have selected an actress.

Female - 25-35 years old - Open to all looks

Location: Around Berlin (Warschauer Str., Mitte, Kreuzberg)

Date: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

Duration: 1 day shoot of 5-6 hours, it will be a “run and gun” style shoot. I will have every shot planned and plan to move quickly.

Pay: I do not have the funds to pay, but snacks and drinks will be provided throughout the shoot, and I will provide a restaurant dinner/drinks for our small crew and cast, once the shoot is finished.

The video will follow a woman who is simply enjoying living and the little things on a normal day. The actress must casually portray independence and self-appreciation with every step. The video will be following her throughout her day as she enjoys the weather, walking around Berlin, riding the subway, sitting by the canal/Spree drinking wine/coffee, reading a book, listening to music, etc. She will be speaking some of the lyrics throughout the video, but not performing them. She will say them as if she is thinking positively and talking to herself with a smirk.

The song is called “Learned That Day” and is about how someone had an intense experience in a relationship that fell apart. But she has persevered and found herself to be more capable than ever.

Here is a video I released in March. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB)

However, the video for "Learned That Day” will have a more casual vibe with no direct performance shots.

Please email headshots, Instagram handle, and a reel if you have one to the email below. Feel free to send any questions if you have them.

CONTACT: 

Email: [philbettermusic@gmail.com](mailto:philbettermusic@gmail.com)

Instagram: @PhilBetter

Thank you and have a great week!

Philip / PhilBetter

Music Video

I am looking for an actress/model for my music video for a song I will release at the beginning of July. As the song is unreleased, I will send it once I have selected an actress.

Female - 25-35 years old - Open to all looks

Location: Around Berlin (Warschauer Str., Mitte, Kreuzberg)

Date: 1 day between the dates of 21 June 2026 - 27 June 2026 (flexible)

Duration: 1 day shoot of 5-6 hours, it will be a “run and gun” style shoot. I will have every shot planned and plan to move quickly.

Pay: I do not have the funds to pay, but snacks and drinks will be provided throughout the shoot, and I will provide a restaurant dinner/drinks for our small crew and cast, once the shoot is finished.

The video will follow a woman who is simply enjoying living and the little things on a normal day. The actress must casually portray independence and self-appreciation with every step. The video will be following her throughout her day as she enjoys the weather, walking around Berlin, riding the subway, sitting by the canal/Spree drinking wine/coffee, reading a book, listening to music, etc. She will be speaking some of the lyrics throughout the video, but not performing them. She will say them as if she is thinking positively and talking to herself with a smirk.

The song is called “Learned That Day” and is about how someone had an intense experience in a relationship that fell apart. But she has persevered and found herself to be more capable than ever.

Here is a video I released in March. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oA-zzkNhJT8&list=RDoA-zzkNhJT8&start_radio=1&pp=ygUPcGhpbGJldHRlcmJlYXRzoAcB)

However, the video for "Learned That Day” will have a more casual vibe with no direct performance shots.

Please email headshots, Instagram handle, and a reel if you have one to the email below. Feel free to send any questions if you have them.

CONTACT: 

Email: [philbettermusic@gmail.com](mailto:philbettermusic@gmail.com)

Instagram: @PhilBetter

Thank you and have a great week!

Philip / PhilBetter

Experiencing haunting glimpses of what could have been, will she choose to finally forgive herself, or choose to risk losing g the only family she has left. SUBMIT RESUME, HEADSHOT AND LINK TO REEL OrchidDayreamsProducin@gmail.c Deadline to submit: June 16'

items.text:
Hello all! Hope you’re well! 

CASTING CALL FOR FEMALE DANCER in MUNICH - only local applicants please as travel/accommodation not provided 

- 1 Rehearsal - 22nd June in Munich, timings TBC most likely at some point between the hours of 11-7pm 
- Show - 23rd June, timings TBC but most likely at some point between 3-10pm
- Location - Central Munich, Germany 
- Any/all dance styles welcome 

If interested please DM me or message hello.showcreation@gmail.com with your photos/work etc as soon as possible as submission close soon. Thank you! Kind regards, Ellis-ann O’Hara

items.text:
**Are you looking for a different kind of acting class?**

Want to take your acting career to the next level?

Want to work with an acting tutor with over 20 years experience in the industry who has worked with some of the biggest directors in the UK? 

Well, Scene 2 Screen is where you need to be! 

We work hard week in week out to deliver screen acting classes that focus on practical learning with a huge emphasis on getting you in front of a camera, and best of all you get 2 showreel style scenes to keep and use how you want each month! 

For the low price of just £85 a month… what are you waiting for? 

Email: [Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com](mailto:Scene2ScreenMCR@gmail.com) to book!

sharedPost.text:
Judith Uchechukwu Moghalu is her real name before she adopted the stage name
Judy Austin.
She is from Umuoji in Anambra State. We have two children together. Sometimes I ask myself, ‘Wetin man do man?’
Anytime we were watching Nollywood movies and Yul Edochie appeared on screen, Judy would lose concentration.
She would openly tell me she loved Yul and praise him.
She also used to say that Yul Edochie’s voice reminded her of her uncle, Chinedu.
I have four pieces of evidence that they were dating under my roof.”
- Mr. Obasi, Judy Austin’s former husband, became emotional during an interview as he presented photos and other materials which he says are evidence of their marriage. #trendy #nigeria

Denne cremede kylling-agurk-majssalat er den perfekte blanding af frisk, sprød og cremet! Hver bid er fyldt med saftig kylling, majs og sprøde agurker vendt i en fyldig, smagfuld dressing. Den er hurtig, lækker og umulig at modstå! 

 Gem denne opskrift til senere, og tag en person, der ville elske denne forfriskende salat!

items.text:
Most actors think a powerful moment needs MORE.

More emotion. More voice. More movement.

I was guilty of this early in my career. When I was in EastEnders, I thought intensity meant turning the volume up. Took me years to realise the opposite was true.

There's a moment in Peaky Blinders where Tommy Shelby walks into a room full of men who want him dead — and he slows down. No raised voice. No big gesture. Just stillness. And somehow that's the scariest thing in the scene.

That's not luck. That's not just Cillian Murphy being naturally magnetic. That is a deliberate, learnable technique.

I've just broken down exactly what he does — the stillness, the delayed reactions, the breath control — and how you can drill it at home. 

Simple exercises. Immediate difference. Because here's the thing: the actors who keep getting hired aren't the ones who feel the most on screen. They're the ones who make you feel the most.

The link to the video is, as usual, in the comments 👇

#ActingTips #ScreenActing #CillianMurphy
items.title: How to Act for the Camera | The Tommy Shelby Technique

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'STEAL HIS ACTING SECRET? THE TOMMY SHELBY TECHNIQUE'

items.text:
Providing an update for my film project "Call Center"

Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. She’s like a big sister to Kenneth as she understands he does have issues with his mental illnesses and tried to be his anchor to calm him down when needed. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

3.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

**4.      Customer (Voice role): Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

Calling into customer support and speaks with Kenneth. Is angry and hostile as he has a technical support problem that he wants fixed not now, but “Right Now”. Has a verbal back and forth with the lead character Kenneth as he tries to resolve the issue.

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks. 

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

topComments.text: Has anxiety and depression been  filled?  ￼

items.text:
🎭 AUDITIONS – JACK ABSOLUTE FLIES AGAIN 🎭

Join us on Wednesday 18 June at 7:00pm at the Harlequin Theatre for auditions for Jack Absolute Flies Again.

Set during the Battle of Britain in 1940, this fast-paced comedy follows RAF pilot Jack Absolute as he returns home determined to win back the heart of his former love, Lydia Languish. Inspired by Sheridan's classic comedy The Rivals, the play is packed with mistaken identities, romantic misunderstandings, larger-than-life characters and plenty of laugh-out-loud moments.

With its blend of wartime spirit, romance and farce, Jack Absolute Flies Again offers a wide range of exciting roles and a fantastic opportunity for performers of all experience levels.

Check out our audition's page on our website: www.harlequinplayers.com/auditions

📅 Auditions: Wednesday 18 June

🕖 Time: 7:00pm

📍 Venue: Harlequin Theatre

We look forward to seeing you there!

items.text:
Poszukuje Mamy z synkiem w wieku od około 3 do 4 lat do sesji video produktu dla dzieci, dla polskiej marki Rabbit & Friends

Sesja (krótkie video -do online- promujące nowy produkt) w dniu 26 czerwca (piątek) lub 27 czerwca (sobota) - dzień do ustalenia, w Warszawie - Targówek. Umowa na wizerunek zarówno dziecka jak i Mamy bezterminowo i bez ograniczeń terytorialnych. 
Płatność 500zł
Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na sylwia@rabbitandfriends.eu do 21czerwca. 
Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać numer telefonu, Twoje imię i nazwisko, imię, wiek i rozmiar ubranka dziecka oraz aktualne zdjęcia buzi i sylwetek.
Na sesje trzeba przeznaczyć ok 3-4godz, w zależności jak sprawnie pójdzie współpraca z kamerzystą 🙂 Jeśli dziecko będzie potrzebować czasu, czy przerwy jesteśmy elastyczne. Byłoby lepiej, gdyby dziecko czuło się swobodnie przed kamerą i było uśmiechnięte, nie wystraszone kamery.

Szukam też dzieci w wieku 3-5, zarówno chłopiec jak i dziewczynka, do drugiej sesji: foto, do tego samego produktu. Już bez Mamy 🙂

Na zdjęciu super Lampka silikonowa Miś Duży z Głośnikiem i Pilotem 🙂 

W razie pytań, proszę pisać na maila.
